unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* use our own printf() functions */
/* keep this as LAST include */
/* libcurl's debug builds provide an extra function */
/* since O_BINARY as used in bitmasks, setting it to zero makes it usable in source code but yet it doesn't ruin anything */
unit.cpp:define:
#define CURL_CA_CERT_ERRORMSG \ "More details here: https://curl.se/docs/sslcerts.html

" \ "curl failed to verify the legitimacy of the server and therefore " \ "could not
establish a secure connection to it. To learn more about " \ "this situation and
how to fix it, please visit the web page mentioned " \ "above.
"
unit.function_decl: static CURLcode single_transfer(struct GlobalConfig *global, struct OperationConfig *config, CURLSH *share, bool capath_from_env, bool *added);

function.name: is_fatal_error
is_pkcs11_uri

unit.comment: /* * get_vms_file_size does what it takes to get the real size of the file * * For fixed files, find out the size of the EOF block and adjust. * * For all others, have to read the entire file in, discarding the contents. * Most posted text files will be small, and binary files like zlib archives * and CD/DVD images should be either a STREAM_LF format or a fixed format. * */

function.name: vms_realfilesize

unit.comment: /* * * VmsSpecialSize checks to see if the stat st_size can be trusted and * if not to call a routine to get the correct size. * */

function.name: VmsSpecialSize

unit.comment: /* first node */
/* last node */
/* add_per_transfer creates a new 'per_transfer' node in the linked list of transfers */

function.name: add_per_transfer

unit.comment: /* Remove the specified transfer from the list (and free it), return the next in line */

function.name: del_per_transfer
pre_transfer

unit.comment: /* When doing serial transfers, we use a single fixed error area */

function.name: single_transfer_cleanup
post_per_transfer
function.parameter_list: (struct GlobalConfig *global, struct per_transfer *per, CURLcode result, bool *retryp, long *delay)

function.name: url_proto

unit.comment: /* create the next (singular) transfer */

function.name: single_transfer
function.parameter_list: (struct GlobalConfig *global, struct OperationConfig *config, CURLSH *share, bool capath_from_env, bool *added)

unit.comment: /* number of easy handles currently added */
/* * add_parallel_transfers() sets 'morep' to TRUE if there are more transfers * to add even after this call returns. sets 'addedp' to TRUE if one or more * transfers were added. */

function.name: add_parallel_transfers
parallel_transfers
serial_transfers

unit.comment: /* setup a transfer for the given config */

function.name: transfer_per_config

unit.comment: /* * 'create_transfer' gets the details and sets up a new transfer if 'added' * returns TRUE. */

function.name: create_transfer
run_all_transfers
operate
